name: result_marks
description: Two iconographic result marks, one family: SUCCESS — a radiant gold burst medal with a laurel and a shining star center; FAILURE — the same medal design but cracked down the middle, dimmed to pewter grey-gold, star dulled.
prompt_extra: same medal silhouette in both cells; only the emotional state changes (radiant vs cracked-and-dim)

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, richer gold tones and a touch more ornament

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly cooler, simpler and more minimal composition
